# Secret Scan Allowlist
# Lines starting with # are comments.
# Each non-empty line is either:
#   - A file path (relative to repo root) to skip entirely
#   - A pattern prefixed with "content:" to ignore specific matched strings
#
# Examples:
#   patrolman.conf.example        # skip this file entirely
#   content:key_goes_here         # ignore this placeholder string
#   content:EXAMPLE_API_KEY       # ignore this example value

# --- Files safe to ignore ---
patrolman.conf.example
.github/secret-scan-allowlist.txt
.github/scripts/secret-scan.sh

# --- Content patterns safe to ignore ---
content:key_goes_here
content:EXAMPLE_API_KEY
content:your_api_key_here
content:xxx-xxx-xxx
